name: KPI Weekly Digest — Monday 08:00 GMT
notes: Runs every Monday at 08:00 GMT. Independently queries v_gate_tracker and v_supplement_mrr, joins them, formats a plain-text KPI digest, and emails it to Keith. 2026-05-19: deposit metric removed (mechanic shelved 2026-05-08) — now reports non-cash founding-member list opt-ins via v_gate_tracker.fm_list_optins. Requires the updated pipeline_overview.sql view applied to the target DB. Env-free: Supabase auth via bound 'Supabase Service Role' httpCustomAuth credential; digest recipient hardcoded; Supabase project URL baked in (phqrjtnflovicgkngieu). 2026-05-19 (topology rebuild): the earlier sequential chain (cron → Gate → MRR → Format) failed whenever the first view returned no rows — the HTTP node emitted zero items, the chain stopped, and NO digest was sent (silent failure exactly in the pre-launch state where a zero digest is still wanted). Now: cron fans out to BOTH fetch nodes in parallel; each has alwaysOutputData + continueOnFail so an empty view or HTTP error still emits an item instead of killing the run; a Merge node (mode: append) waits for BOTH branches before triggering Format Digest, so the Code node's $('Fetch Gate Tracker')/$('Fetch Supplement MRR') references always resolve (this is the correct fix for the historical 'Node hasn't been executed' fan-in error — a Merge join, not a sequential chain). Format Digest is fully defensive: handles array / object / empty / missing payloads, defaults every figure to 0, always returns exactly one item so the email always sends, and prints a DATA SOURCES row-count line (plus an explicit warning when both views are empty) so a legitimate all-zero week is distinguishable from a broken pipeline.
